mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, leader, phone, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_dept ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, parent_id, name, leader, phone, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_dept WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, leader = #{leader}, phone = #{phone}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
